figures.caption: Table 4: MIMIC-III in-hospital mortality (AUROC), continual protocol (B) demographic shift by age bucket. We report the mean and standard error over three runs.
Figure 2: Stability–plasticity trade-offs on MIMIC-III mortality prediction under protocols (A) and (B); points are means across three runs (see tables for ± SE).
Table 1: UCI Heart Disease (binary classification, AUROC). We report the mean and standard error over five runs.
Table 2: CDC Diabetes Health Indicators (3-class classification, Macro-F1). We report the mean and standard error over five runs.

Figure 1: Stability–plasticity trade-off on open-access tabular datasets (mean across five runs; tables give mean ± SE). The x-axis is plasticity (Avg. Current-Task), and the y-axis is stability (Avg. Past-Task). Segments link no-replay and replay for each baseline.
Table 3: MIMIC-III in-hospital mortality (AUROC), continual protocol (A) time-window shift by admission year. We report the mean and standard error over three runs.
